results.rendered_html:
sāṃtānika (von saṃtāna)
1〉 adj. (f. ī)
a〉 Nachkommenschaft wünschend  M. 11,1 .  BHĀG. P. 6,14,11 . 9,14,9 .
— b〉 vom Saṃtāna genannten Baume genommen u. s. w.: sraj  KIR. 18,20 .
— 2〉 m. pl. Bez. bestimmter Welten  MBH. 15,708  nach der Lesart der  ed. Bomb. 
— Vgl. saṃtānika.

results.rendered_html:
sāṃtānika a. (kī f.)
1 Stretching, spreading, extending (as a tree).
2 Relating to offspring or descendants.
3 Relating to the tree Saṃtāna, q. v.
— kaḥ A Brāhmaṇa who wishes to marry for the sake of issue.
